name: Boss is mad I fell off ladder, threatening my job, what rights?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I fell off ladder, threatening my job, what rights?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Protected from retaliation; firing for comp claim is illegal.**

File retaliation complaint with labor dept alongside comp. Document threats.

- Utah/Idaho ban reprisals.
- Seek reinstatement or damages.
- Witnesses help.

Report to EEOC if discrimination; attorney essential.
